title: New Recurring Tasks features to start 2025 with a bang!
excerpt:
Happy New Year to everybody in the monday.com community! (It’s still January, right?!). 
I hope you all had a wonderful, restful break over the festive period, and got to spend plenty of time with your family and friends…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Happy New Year to everybody in the monday.com community! (It’s still January, right?!).

I hope you all had a wonderful, restful break over the festive period, and got to spend plenty of time with your family and friends.

Fresh off a blockbuster year for our Recurring Tasks for monday.com app, which has just been named ‘Most Installed App’ on the monday.com Apps Marketplace for a second year in a row, we want to kick off 2025 in the best way possible—with three brand new features, shaped by your valuable feedback!

If there’s one thing we love about being part of the monday.com community, it’s how driven and vocal you are when it comes to improving the tools you use every day. After meeting many of you at monday.com Elevate in London and New York, we came back to the drawing board (well actually, our monday.com board) fired up with fresh ideas—and some very helpful feedback!

So, let’s dive into the latest updates, and see what’s new with Recurring Tasks

Here’s what’s new with Recurring Tasks

  • Custom scheduling: Create tasks on your own terms by choosing specific custom dates, allowing you to tailor schedules to fit your workflow perfectly.

  • Never-end scheduling: Ensure tasks repeat indefinitely until you decide to update or stop them—perfect for ongoing work with no set end date.

  • Editable automatic scheduling: Make changes to your schedules with just a few clicks, keeping everything flexible as your plans evolve.
